subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.19
question_html:
Which of the 0.001 mol dm−3 solutions is most likely to have a pH of 11.3?

A.  Ca(OH)2 (aq)

B.  H3PO4 (aq)

C.  NaOH (aq)

D.  NH4OH (aq)
examiners_html: This required calculation of pH of a base – not an easy task for SL candidates without a calculator. 28% of the candidates answered the question correctly.
